full_text:
TLS meeting

Ada, Hanna, Zhihan
02.09.2025

#1 - GeoMx data processing

Zhihan & Iga

From Iga

GeoMx TLS data processing

Separate TLS AOIs from the batch3 dataset for QC
LOQ filtering - it was 1%, but now changed to 5% (of all ROIs) to remove genes which are not expressed in many ROIs - this is done only for TLS dataset to keep more TLS-specific genes
GDR filtering - it was 5%, but now a middle threshold of 3% (of all genes) is used (only 120 worst AOIs are removed from whole batch3)
Normalisation
deseq2+vst normalisation
Q3 normalisation - should lower the effect of noisy genes
Batch effect removal - harmony
Dimensionality reduction and clustering - tSNE + UMAP
Now we have QCed + Normalised + batch effect removed TLS dataset with Expression Values Mtx

Batch1+2+3 - tSNE+UMAP - Patient - All

Batch1+2+3 - tSNE+UMAP - Segment - All

Batch1+2+3 - tSNE+UMAP - tls_status - All

Batch1+2+3 - tSNE+UMAP - tls_status - stroma

QC passed 198 TLS AOIs / 274 TLS AOIs selected

198 TLS AOIs - tSNE+UMAP - tls_status

198 TLS AOIs - tSNE+UMAP - Patient

Quality issue - Low GDR for minibatch 1, 3 and 4

Quality issue - Low GDR for minibatch 1, 3 and 4

S309_S225 AOIs SNR

S309_S225 AOIs SNR

Re-QCed 225 TLS AOIs (5% LOQ, 3%GDR, Q3)

Re-QCed 225 TLS AOIs (5% LOQ, 3%GDR, Q3)

Re-QCed 225 TLS AOIs (5% LOQ, 3%GDR, Q3)

Before harmony batch effect remove for TLS AOIs

After harmony batch effect remove for TLS AOIs

225 TLS AOIs - tSNE+UMAP - harmony - batch_nr

225 TLS AOIs - tSNE+UMAP - harmony - patient

#2 - GeoMx data analysis

Zhihan

Chemokines/receptors: CXCL13, CCL19, CCL20, CCL21, CXCR5, CXCR3, CCR7
TLS signaling: LTA, LTB, LTBR, ​​TNFSF13B (BAFF), TNFRSF13C (BAFFR), LAMP3
B cells/germinal centers: MS4A1 (CD20), CD79A, CD19, BCL6, CD22, CD27
T cells/Tfh pathways: ICOS, PDCD1 (PD-1), IL21, SATB1, CD3D, CD3E, CD3G, CD4, CD8A, CD8B, CD28, CTLA4, IL2RA (CD25), FOXP3, LAG3, TIGIT
Plasma cell differentiation: MZB1, XBP1, PRDM1, IGHM, CD38, CD138
Cytokines - T: IFNG, IL2, IL4, IL17A, IL21
Cytokines - B: IL6, IL10

Key TLS genes boxplot

DEG - GC

DEG - S

Functional Pathway Enrichment - GC

Functional Pathway Enrichment - S

Next steps for GeoMx analysis

Normalization + Remove Batch effect for only TLS AOIs
Check quality issues / re-QC / resequencing to recover more TLS AOIs data
Enrichment analysis
Deconvolution analysis - TLS cell franctions distributions
Find and check interesting TLS related pathways, key genes / related functions inside
ROIs alignment with tcycif cell counts
Spatial pattern recognition
Cell-cell interactions (ligand–receptor analysis)
Any ideas?

From Iga

#3 - ROIs alignment

Zhihan, Ada, Hanna

Purpose of the integration, listing main objectives

Source material, where each of the images are

Naming system for: AOIs/ROIs from GeoMx and TLS unique identifiers, CycIF images, GeoMx images, HE images

Setting a timeline, assigning tasks and agreeing on a follow-up meeting to check progress

ROIs alignment
